name: Transaction Alert
subject: Transaction Alert - {{ doc.payment_ref }}
message:
Transaction Alert

UTR Number: {{ doc.utr_number }}

Status: {{ doc.status }}

Settled At: {{ doc.settled_at }}

name: EMI Due Reminder
subject: EMI Due Reminder - {{ doc.name }}
message:
EMI Payment Reminder

EMI Amount: ₹{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.monthly_emi) }}

Due Date: {{ doc.next_emi_date }}

Please ensure sufficient balance in your linked account.

name: NPA Classification Alert
subject: NPA Alert - {{ doc.loan_account }} classified as {{ doc.npa_classification }}

NPA Classification Alert

name: Fraud Alert Notification
subject: Fraud Alert - {{ doc.alert_type }} ({{ doc.severity }})
message:

Status: {{ doc.status }}

Description: {{ doc.description }}

name: KYC Reverification Due
subject: KYC Re-verification Due - {{ doc.full_name }}
message:
KYC Re-verification Required

Customer: {{ doc.full_name }}
